name: Chocolate Cheesecake (2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust: Thoroughly blend the chocolate crumbs and melted butter together. Press into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
3. Prepare the filling: Bring cream cheese to room temperature. Beat cream cheese, sugar, and eggs on medium speed until smooth and fluffy.
4. Spoon half the mixture into the crust. Stir melted chocolate into remaining filling. Blend thoroughly.
5. Drizzle over filling in the crust to form swirls.
6. Bake for 50 minutes. Cool completely on a wire rack.
7. Transfer cake to serving plate. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate at least 2 hours.
8. Uncover and remove springform pan sides.
9. Prepare frosting by combining melted chocolate and sour cream in a small bowl.
10. Spread over top and sides of the cake. Refrigerate briefly to set frosting.
